origin.title: The Name Behind the Brand
origin.quote: A mighty one among the jinn said: I will bring it to you before you rise from your place — and indeed I am strong and trustworthy for this.
origin.body: Ifrit takes its name from the Quranic Ifrit — a being that combined extraordinary capability with complete trustworthiness. That is the standard we hold ourselves to: the speed and strength to move anything across the globe, and the integrity to do it exactly as promised.

contact.title: Start a Conversation
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need. We respond within 24 hours.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your product, quantity, destination, and any specific requirements.
contact.success: Your message was sent. We'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try WhatsApp instead.
contact.orWhatsapp: Or reach us directly on WhatsApp

about.title: About Ifrit
about.subtitle: A trading company built on speed, strength, and trustworthiness — rooted in Yiwu, reaching the world.
about.storyBody: The Ifrit of Surah An-Naml declared two things before performing an extraordinary feat: strength and trustworthiness. We took those two qualities as our founding mandate. Every service we offer, every supplier relationship we maintain, every shipment we handle — held to that standard.
about.yiwuBody: Yiwu is the wholesale capital of the world — 75,000 booths across 5 zones, covering over 400,000 product categories. Being physically based here is not an advantage. It is a prerequisite. We walk these floors daily so you don't have to.
about.missionBody: To be the most reliable bridge between global buyers and the Chinese market — removing language barriers, eliminating supplier risk, and delivering exactly what was promised.
approachItems: Direct communication — no account managers or ticket systems
Recommendations based on your interest, not our margin

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hi Ifrit, I found your website and I'd like to enquire about your services.
